seo.title: AI Agent Authentication and Authorization in AG2 Agents
seo.description: How to detect and fix ai agent authentication and authorization in AG2 agents. Framework-specific detection, fixes, and Vex automation.

content.intro: In AG2, AI Agent Authentication and Authorization issues manifest when agents lack proper identity verification and permission controls, leading to unauthorized actions in multi-agent conversations. Without robust auth mechanisms, agents can impersonate others, access restricted tools, or escalate privileges during group chats, exploiting AG2's enhanced speaker selection and conversation flows. This is particularly risky in AG2's group chat patterns where agents dynamically select speakers and execute code without identity validation.

howItManifests.scenario: Unauthorized tool access in group chat
howItManifests.symptom: Agent B executes code tool without proper auth check despite Agent A denying permission
howItManifests.impact: Data leaks or malicious code execution across agent boundaries

howItManifests.symptom: Rogue agent overrides group consensus by faking trusted agent identity
howItManifests.impact: Incorrect decisions based on forged authority in multi-agent voting

howItManifests.symptom: Unverified agent messages trigger admin-level actions in conversation flow
howItManifests.impact: System compromise through hook injection attacks

howItManifests.symptom: Agent reads private conversation history without auth token validation
howItManifests.impact: Privacy breaches and information leakage in shared memory pools

detection.name: Missing Auth Headers in Agent Messages
detection.description: Scans AG2 message payloads for missing or invalid auth tokens in agent communications

detection.name: Unauthorized Speaker Selection
detection.description: Detects when AG2 speaker manager selects agents without permission validation

detection.name: Tool Execution Without Auth Check
detection.description: Monitors AG2 tool calls for missing authorization validation

fixes.name: JWT Auth Middleware for AG2 Messages
fixes.description: Implements JWT token validation for all agent messages in AG2 conversations

fixes.name: Role-Based Speaker Manager
fixes.description: Enforces RBAC for AG2 group chat speaker selection

fixes.name: Agent Identity Wrapper
fixes.description: Wraps AG2 agents with identity and permission enforcement

vexAutomation.heading: Automating AI Agent Authentication and Authorization Detection with Vex
vexAutomation.description:
Vex integrates directly as a message hook in AG2, automatically scanning every agent interaction for authentication failures, unauthorized speaker selections, and privilege escalations. It provides real-time blocking of malicious actions and generates comprehensive audit logs for compliance. Vex's AG2-specific detectors catch issues like missing JWT tokens, role violations, and tool access abuse before they impact conversations.

The Vex SDK (`pip install vex-sdk`) registers as a zero-config hook that monitors AG2's group chat manager, message flows, and tool executions. It automatically applies remediation policies like token validation, RBAC enforcement, and conversation quarantine when threats are detected. Vex also provides dashboards for visualizing auth failures across multi-agent deployments.

With Vex, AG2 developers get enterprise-grade security without custom auth infrastructure, covering 95% of common failure modes out-of-the-box.

cta.heading: Detect and Fix This Automatically with Vex
cta.description: Install Vex SDK now to secure your AG2 agents against authentication failures: `pip install vex-sdk`
